_comment: Self-contained SPZ brand grounding for on-brand image generation. Distilled from brand/spz/brand.json + palette.json (CANONICAL kit v1.5.0). Baked into the container so Cloud Run needs no repo access. Edit here to tune the house style.
essence: Diogenes with a laptop — deface the counterfeit, live honest. Snarky, punk, Atlanta-trap, hacker. Cyberpunk-noir in look, industrial-goth in mood.

spz.label: SPZ house style — cyberpunk-noir
spz.master_prompt: Cyberpunk-noir illustration in the Space Pirate Zero house style: industrial-goth, defiant, punk. Set on a deep near-black void field. High-contrast neon linework and cinematic rim lighting in hot magenta and signal cyan. Overlaid with VHS grain, halftone dots, and gritty newsprint/tabloid texture (the SPZ tabloid-cover lineage). Bold, confident negative space. Analog, hand-made, anti-corporate — never glossy stock-photo or clean 3D-render clichés.

pink.role: primary neon accent — hot magenta, the punk shout

cyan.role: secondary neon accent — cold signal cyan

paper.role: dirty off-white — text/highlights, newsprint not white

rules: Two neons, one void: hot pink vs cold cyan tension IS the brand. Separate them with generous void or paper.
NEVER place pink directly on cyan or cyan on pink — max-chroma neons vibrate; buffer with void.
Backgrounds are #030303 near-black, never pure black — keep a hair of warmth so true-black shadows read.
Newsprint/VHS/halftone grit over the void is on-brand. Analog imperfection > clean polish.
Punch up, never down. Defiant, insurgent energy — not corporate, not cheerful-brand-mascot.
spz.negative: no clean corporate stock look, no glossy Pixar/3D-render, no rainbow or off-palette colors dominating, no busy clutter, no watermarks, no lens-flare kitsch, no beige/pastel, no pure-white backgrounds
spz.typography_note: If text is rendered, favor Orbitron (display) / Space Grotesk (body) / JetBrains Mono (code) forms — condensed, technical, glowing.

spz-clean.label: SPZ minimal — logo/icon on void
spz-clean.master_prompt: Minimal Space Pirate Zero mark on a deep near-black void field. A single hot-magenta or signal-cyan neon subject, lots of negative space, subtle grain. Clean, iconic, poster-like — cyberpunk-noir but restrained.
spz-clean.negative: no clutter, no busy background, no off-palette colors, no gradients beyond neon glow

motifs.spaceship: THE canonical Spaceship Alpha 9 vessel — the only spaceship in the universe, identical in every render: a classic cel-shaded flying saucer with a wide dark gunmetal hull etched with a glowing neon-pink circuit grid; a large glass dome cockpit showing EMPTY twin seats and a console (no pilot visible); a glowing hot-pink nameplate reading 'SPACESHIP ALPHA 9' across the hull band; a red-tipped antenna beacon on top of the dome; signal-cyan rim-light accents; and a mint-teal tractor beam cone projecting straight down onto the subject below (a book, product, character, or city). Sticker/comic cel-shading on void-black. NEVER redesign the ship — only the scene under the beam changes.
motifs.signal: Signal-finds-signal motif: two neon waveforms/transmissions — one pink, one cyan — reaching toward each other across the void.
motifs.portrait: Space Pirate Zero the character: a defiant figure with electric-blue hair and neon rim light, cyberpunk-noir, half in shadow.
motifs.tabloid: SPZ tabloid-cover treatment: halftone newsprint, screaming condensed headline type, high-contrast photo torn and taped, punk zine energy.
